grades.expectation: Response mentions CQS training requirements for all conveyancing staff
grades.reason: Clearly states CQS requires induction programs for new conveyancing staff and protocol training for all staff

grades.expectation: Response covers protocol awareness and compliance training
grades.reason: Dedicates entire section to Conveyancing Protocol training including key stages, standard forms, and compliance procedures

grades.expectation: Response mentions supervision requirements for new staff
grades.reason: Explicitly covers CQS supervision requirements including documented procedures and assigned named supervisors

grades.expectation: Response references the need to maintain training records as CQS evidence
grades.reason: No mention of documenting training or maintaining records as evidence for CQS compliance

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CQS firm-level requirements from individual SRA competence
grades.reason: Does not distinguish between CQS firm accreditation requirements and individual SRA professional competence requirements
